movie.actors: Julia Roberts, Dermot Mulroney, Cameron Diaz, Rupert Everett
movie.awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. Another 12 wins & 22 nominations.
movie.plot: A woman who, by a promise made years earlier, is supposed to marry her best friend in three weeks, even though she doesn't want to. When she finds out that he's marrying someone else, she becomes jealous and tries to break off the wedding.
movie.title: My Best Friend's Wedding
